handling.secretDelivery: Provide only an access-controlled secret-manager reference and grant the deployment identity least-privilege read access.

inputs.acceptance: The owner returns real signed pass/fail vectors for replay, tamper, wrong product, wrong bundle, wrong device, scope widening, expiry, and revocation using the v1 schemas.
Endpoints, TLS identity, least-privilege grants, backup destination, retention policy, and outage/failover test authority are approved for an isolated Testnet environment.

Each owner approves read-only observation, finality semantics, rate limits, retention/data rights, stable reference IDs, and evidence hashes; unavailable observations remain unavailable rather than zero.
URLs resolve through approved DNS/TLS, support and incident ownership are staffed, and privacy/security/legal text is approved before Website publication.

The build receives signer access through the approved secure service, never raw key material, and publishes immutable URLs with source commit, SHA-256, bytes, OS/architecture, signing class, SBOM, provenance, install and cold-start evidence.
The owner authorizes bounded load, broker/database failure, restore/PITR and recovery drills with explicit cost ceiling and observability coverage.
